reviews.comment:
El sánguche de jamón crudo es el mejor sánguche que comí en mi vida. Vine desde Mar del Plata solo para esto. Las chicas unas genias!

(Translated by Google)
The prosciutto sandwich is the best sandwich I've ever had. I came all the way from Mar del Plata just for this. The girls were amazing!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1cTlydWpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Horrible el señor mayor que despacha nafta. Es un desubicado, agresivo y maleducado. Como él tiene un perrito nos obligó a irnos con nuestro perro porque el suyo ladraba. Insultó y se venía encima. Un asco! La mujer que limpia los baños solo miró y le indicó que nos corriese. Un asco, ella y él. Lamentable que tengan gente así en un lugar tan indispensable.

(Translated by Google)
The elderly man who pumps gas is awful. He's inappropriate, aggressive, and rude. Because he has a small dog, he forced us to leave with our dog because his was barking. He insulted us and kept coming at us. Disgusting! The woman who cleans the restrooms just watched and told him to move us. Disgusting, both of them. It's a shame they have people like that working in such an essential place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNneDk2UVpBEAE
